source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/04_G1717CW 외 7종/90_규격 Test report/1. 신청서 및 제출서류/11. 부품인증서_사양서 (추가 자료는 제품 검토 후 요청)/POE Injector/EMC/JAT24041102618RC-2 RoHS证书 POE供电器.pdf

document.title: Certificate of Conformity No: JAT24041102618RC-2
authorityOrJurisdiction: Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd.

sourceSummary.oneLine: Certificate of Conformity for SDAPO POE injector models tested for RoHS Directive compliance.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports RoHS conformity evidence for the listed POE injector models, read together with test report JAT24041102618RR-2.
keyPoints: Submitted sample tested and found to comply with RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU, (EU) 2015/863, and (EU) 2017/2102.
Applicable IEC 62321 series standards are listed for showing compliance with essential requirements.
Certificate is based on evaluation of one sample and does not imply assessment of production.

entities.name: SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Applicant : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd. ... Manufacturer : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Without the written approval of Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd., this certificate is not permitted to be reproduced, except in full.

concepts.name: IEC 62321 series
concepts.evidence: The standard(s) used for showing compliance with the essential requirements: IEC 62321-1:2013, IEC 62321-2:2013 ... IEC 62321-8:2017

evidence.claim: The document is a Certificate of Conformity numbered JAT24041102618RC-2.
The applicant and manufacturer are SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd. ... Manufacturer : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The equipment under test is a POE injector with trade mark SDAPO.
evidence.evidenceText: EUT : POE injector Trade Mark : SDAPO

evidence.claim: Listed models include PSE30, PSE801, PSE30G, PSE801G, PSE30TG, PSE802G, PSE60G, PSE156G, PSE90G, and POE4805.
The submitted sample was tested and found to comply with RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU, (EU) 2015/863, and (EU) 2017/2102.
evidence.evidenceText: The submitted sample of the above equipment has been tested and found to comply with the following European Directive: RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU & (EU) 2015/863 & (EU) 2017/2102

evidence.claim: IEC 62321 standards were used for showing compliance with essential requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: The standard(s) used for showing compliance with the essential requirements: IEC 62321-1:2013, IEC 62321-2:2013 IEC 62321-3-1:2013, IEC 62321-3-2:2020 IEC 62321-4:2013, IEC 62321-5:2013 IEC 62321-6:2015, IEC 62321-7-1: 2015 IEC 62321-7-2:2017, IEC 62321-8:2017

evidence.claim: The associated test report number is JAT24041102618RR-2.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicable Standard(s) Test Report(s) Number ... JAT24041102618RR-2

evidence.claim: The certificate is based on evaluation of one sample and does not imply assessment of production.
evidence.evidenceText: This certificate is based on an evaluation of one sample of above mentioned product. It does not imply assessment of the production of the product.
